1_conference_system_type.principle: System type based on room size and features needed

3_controller_sizing.principle: Controller must support total unit count + expansion
3_controller_sizing.guide: D6284: up to 128 basic units. D7700/D7701: expandable with D7706 hubs. HD8107: premium with video/recording.

4_audio_output_integration.principle: Conference audio output feeds room PA system
4_audio_output_integration.chain: Conference Controller → Line Out → Mixer Amplifier (MA/MP) → Ceiling Speakers (DSP series)

5_cabling.principle: Daisy-chain or star topology using 8P8C (RJ45-style) conference cable

specs.topology: Daisy-chain (most common) or star via hub (D7706)

6_voting_and_interpretation.principle: Voting and simultaneous interpretation require premium units
6_voting_and_interpretation.voting: D5843 or D5841 with voting software
6_voting_and_interpretation.interpretation: D5844 with interpretation channels, requires interpreter booth setup

7_wireless_mic_integration.principle: Wireless mics connect to amplifier aux input for PA reinforcement
7_wireless_mic_integration.guide: DW01/DW15 receiver → AUX input on mixer amplifier. Ensure frequency coordination if multiple wireless systems.

8_recording.principle: Conference systems can output to recording devices

9_room_acoustics.principle: STI ≥ 0.50 for speech intelligibility in conference rooms
tips: Speaker placement: ceiling speakers above delegates
